page.title: Simple Captain Manager Texts
page.t: Provides options to assign, dismiss, or fire the captain from the context menu.
Automatically assigns the crew member with the highest piloting skill from the unassigned personnel.
Dismisses the captain and changes their status to unassigned personnel.
A captain is already assigned to this ship.
Fills this ship with the best unassigned crew from other player-owned ships.
Transferred %2 best unassigned crew to ship %1.
Train captains of selected ships using piloting seminars from your inventory.
Seminar training complete: Promoted %1 captains. (Consumed: basic x%2, 1-star x%3, 2-star x%4, 3-star x%5, 4-star x%6)
